ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., 3rd Position, Final, Semi Final, Quarter Final) */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "team_one_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team_two_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Team A won by X Run(s)) */,
  "scores_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the scores of both teams */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the winning team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the match is played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the match */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the match */,
  "umpire_one_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire_two_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_one_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_one_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire_one_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_one_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire_two_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_two_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_two_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_two_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm spinner) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the team */,
  "wickets_lost" INTEGER /* Wickets lost by the team */,
  "overs_played" REAL /* Overs played by the team */,
  "extras" INTEGER /* Extra runs scored in the match */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit by the team */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit by the team */,
  "wides" INTEGER /* Number of wides bowled */,
  "no_balls" INTEGER /* Number of no-balls bowled */,
  "run_rate" REAL /* Run rate of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, player) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Type of match (e.g., 3rd Position, Final, Semi Final, Quarter Final)
